sentences.target: Ich kenne die Entfernung zur nächsten Haltestelle.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkɛnə diː ɛntˈfɛʁnʊŋ tsuːɐ̯ ˈnɛːkstən ˈhaltəˌʃtɛlə/

translations.de: Ich kenne die Entfernung zur nächsten Haltestelle.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkɛnə diː ɛntˈfɛʁnʊŋ tsuːɐ̯ ˈnɛːkstən ˈhaltəˌʃtɛlə/
translations.en: I know the distance to the next stop.
translations.es: Sé la distancia hasta la próxima parada.
translations.fr: Je connais la distance jusqu'à l'arrêt le plus proche.
translations.it: Conosco la distanza fino alla fermata più vicina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我知道到下一站的距离。
translations.yue: 我知去下一個站有幾遠。
translations.ru: Я знаю расстояние до следующей остановки.
translations.pt: Sei a distância até a próxima parada.
translations.he: אני יודע את המרחק לתחנה הבאה.
translations.tr: Bir sonraki durağa olan mesafeyi biliyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi biết khoảng cách đến điểm dừng tiếp theo.
translations.nl: Ik weet de afstand tot de volgende halte.
translations.uk: Я знаю відстань до наступної зупинки.
translations.hu: Tudom, milyen messze van a következő megálló.
translations.hi: मुझे अगले स्टॉप तक की दूरी पता है.
translations.el: Ξέρω την απόσταση μέχρι την επόμενη στάση.
translations.nb: Jeg vet avstanden til neste holdeplass.
translations.id: Saya tahu jarak ke halte berikutnya.
translations.sv: Jag vet avståndet till nästa hållplats.
translations.ro: Știu distanța până la următoarea stație.
translations.da: Jeg ved, hvor langt der er til næste stoppested.
translations.ja: 次の停留所までの距離を知っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb 'kenne'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selecting an accusative object ('die Entfernung').
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; agrees with 'Entfernung' as the direct object.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'kenne' (accusative).
Preposition governing dative; contracted form of 'zu der', introducing the dative NP headed by 'Haltestelle'.
Attributive adjective in superlative form, dative feminine singular (-en), agreeing with 'Haltestelle'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'zur' (dative).

sentences.target: Die Entfernung ist gut für einen Spaziergang.
sentences.reading: /diː ɛntˈfɛʁnʊŋ ɪst ɡuːt fyːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nən ʃpaˈt͡siːɐ̯ɡaŋ/

translations.de: Die Entfernung ist gut für einen Spaziergang.
translations.ipa: /diː ɛntˈfɛʁnʊŋ ɪst ɡuːt fyːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nən ʃpaˈt͡siːɐ̯ɡaŋ/
translations.en: The distance is good for a walk.
translations.es: Es una buena distancia para caminar.
translations.fr: C'est une bonne distance pour se promener.
translations.it: È una buona distanza per fare una passeggiata.
translations.pt: É uma boa distância para caminhar.
translations.vi: Khoảng cách này phù hợp để đi bộ.
translations.nl: Dit is een goede afstand om te lopen.
translations.uk: Ця відстань добре підходить для прогулянки.
translations.hi: यह पैदल चलने के लिए अच्छी दूरी है.
translations.nb: Dette er en fin avstand å gå.
translations.sv: Det är ett lagom avstånd att gå.
translations.ro: Este o distanță bună pentru o plimbare.
translations.cs: Je to dobrá vzdálenost na procházku.
translations.da: Det er en god afstand at gå.
translations.ja: 歩くのにちょうどいい距離です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; marks the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the copular clause.
Auxiliary verb (copula), present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to the predicative 'gut' and PP complement.
Predicative adjective (positive degree) serving as subject complement with 'sein'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the complement indicating suitability/purpose.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; agrees with 'Spaziergang'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'für' (accusative).

sentences.target: Mein Handy misst die Entfernung grob.

translations.de: Mein Handy misst die Entfernung grob.
translations.en: My phone roughly measures the distance.
translations.es: Mi teléfono mide la distancia de forma aproximada.
translations.fr: Mon téléphone mesure la distance de façon approximative.
translations.it: Il mio telefono misura la distanza in modo approssimativo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的手机大致测量距离。
translations.yue: 我部手機粗略量度距離。
translations.pt: Meu celular mede a distância de forma aproximada.
translations.he: הטלפון שלי מודד את המרחק בקירוב.
translations.vi: Điện thoại của tôi đo khoảng cách một cách xấp xỉ.
translations.nl: Mijn telefoon meet de afstand grofweg.
translations.hu: A telefonom nagyjából méri a távolságot.
translations.hi: मेरा फोन दूरी को मोटे तौर पर मापता है.
translations.pl: Mój telefon mierzy odległość w przybliżeniu.
translations.el: Το τηλέφωνό μου μετράει την απόσταση κατά προσέγγιση.
translations.id: Ponsel saya mengukur jarak secara kasar.
translations.sv: Min telefon mäter avståndet på ett ungefär.
translations.ja: 私のスマホは距離を大まかに測ります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative neuter singular (no ending), modifying 'Handy'.
Common noun, neuter singular; subject of 'misst'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; irregular stem-vowel change (e→i); takes 'die Entfernung' as its accusative object.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; introduces the direct object.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'misst' (accusative).
Adverb of manner modifying the verb 'misst'; uninflected adjectival adverb.

sentences.target: Die Entfernung steht auf dem Schild.

translations.de: Die Entfernung steht auf dem Schild.
translations.en: The distance is on the sign.
translations.es: La distancia está en el cartel.
translations.fr: La distance est indiquée sur le panneau.
translations.it: La distanza è indicata sul cartello.
translations.pt: A distância está indicada na placa.
translations.vi: Khoảng cách được ghi trên biển báo.
translations.nl: De afstand staat op het bord.
translations.hu: A távolság ki van írva a táblán.
translations.ja: 距離は標識に書いてあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; marks the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of 'steht'.
Finite intransitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; here with locative PP 'auf dem Schild' (idiomatically: 'is written').
Preposition governing dative in static location; introduces the dative NP 'dem Schild'.
Definite article, dative neuter singular; agrees with 'Schild'.
Common noun, neuter singular; object of the preposition 'auf' (dative).
